postText:
Analysis: Record wind and solar saved UK from gas imports worth £1bn in March 2026 | @DrSimEvans Ho Woo Nam

Read here: https://t.co/B32uTOPPAI https://t.co/LJDjqWTvsd
bundle.chartTitle: Record wind and solar saved UK from gas imports worth £1bn in March 2024
keyFindings: Combined UK wind and solar generation reached a record monthly high for March in 2024, totaling approximately 10.8 TWh.
The record renewable output in March 2024 avoided an estimated £1 billion in gas import costs for the UK.
Generation during the first quarter of 2024 was consistently at the top of the historical range, outperforming the same period in 2023.
The highest single month of generation in the 2023-2024 period occurred in December 2023, reaching nearly 11 TWh.
The historical data (2013-2022) shows a general upward trend in generation peaks over the decade, with recent years (2023, 2024) setting new baseline highs.
